A letter of recommendation that you’ll need in order to participate in the Gym Challenge.
A stone found in the Galar region with a mysterious power. It’s said that your dreams come true if you find one.
A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a light that allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot.
This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black that shines reddish-black.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These sausages should be boiled before eating.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bob sells is curiously popular in Galar.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bach sells is curiously popular in Galar.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When simmered, the beans suffuse a dish with their mild flavor.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An indispensable tool for mopping up that extra curry left on your plate.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These flour noodles make for a surprisingly good match with curry.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The chewy texture of the mushrooms transforms any dish they’re added to.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When a Slowpoke’s tail falls off, it grows back quickly.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Whether this is the kind of vegetable stalk that Farfetch’d like is unknown.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others. It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from the bones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Potatoes help mellow out a spicy taste, to make a dish more mild.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, these herbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The assortment of vegetables looks quite appealing and healthy.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It’s been a while since it was fried, so it’s gotten greasy.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Even just one boiled egg can really enhance a dish.
Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot.

rusted sword.name: Rusted Sword
rusted sword.description: If held by a Zacian, this item changes its forme to Crowned Sword.

flavor.20: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

rusted shield.name: Rusted Shield
rusted shield.description: If held by a Zamazenta, this item changes its forme to Crowned Shield.

flavor.20: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

fossilized bird.name: Fossilized Bird
fossilized bird.description: Can revive into Dracozolt with Fossilized Drake or Arctozolt with Fossilized Dino.

flavor.20: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once soared through the sky. What it looked like is a mystery.

fossilized fish.name: Fossilized Fish
fossilized fish.description: Can revive into Dracovish with Fossilized Drake or Arctovish with Fossilized Dino.

flavor.20: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

fossilized drake.name: Fossilized Drake
fossilized drake.description: Can revive into Dracozolt with Fossilized Bird or Dracovish with Fossilized Fish.

flavor.20: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once roamed the land. What it looked like is a mystery.

fossilized dino.name: Fossilized Dino
fossilized dino.description: Can revive into Arctovish with Fossilized Fish or Arctozolt with Fossilized Bird.

flavor.20: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

strawberry sweet.name: Strawberry Sweet
strawberry sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it will spin around happily.

love sweet.name: Love Sweet
love sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

berry sweet.name: Berry Sweet
berry sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

clover sweet.name: Clover Sweet
clover sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

flower sweet.name: Flower Sweet
flower sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

star sweet.name: Star Sweet
star sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

ribbon sweet.name: Ribbon Sweet
ribbon sweet.description: Evolves Milcery into Alcremie when held and spun around.

flavor.20: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

sweet apple.name: Sweet Apple
sweet apple.description: Evolves Applin into Appletun when used.

flavor.20: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally sweet.

tart apple.name: Tart Apple
tart apple.description: Evolves Applin into Flapple when used.

flavor.20: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally tart.

throat spray.name: Throat Spray
throat spray.description: Raises holder's Special Attack by 1 stage after it uses a sound move. Single use.

flavor.20: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.

eject pack.name: Eject Pack
eject pack.description: If the holder's stat stages are lowered, it switches to a chosen ally. Single use.

flavor.20: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder’s stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

heavy-duty boots.name: Heavy-Duty Boots
heavy-duty boots.description: When switching in, the holder is unaffected by hazards on its side of the field.

flavor.20: These boots prevent the effects of traps set on the battlefield.

blunder policy.name: Blunder Policy
blunder policy.description: If the holder misses due to accuracy, its Speed is raised by 2 stages. Single use.

flavor.20: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.

room service.name: Room Service
room service.description: If Trick Room is active, the holder's Speed is lowered by 1 stage. Single use.

flavor.20: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.

utility umbrella.name: Utility Umbrella
utility umbrella.description: The holder ignores rain- and sun-based effects.

flavor.20: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very small amount of Exp. Points.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a small amount of Exp. Points.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a moderate amount of Exp. Points.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a large amount of Exp. Points.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very large amount of Exp. Points.
A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

tr00.name: TR00
tr00.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Swords Dance. One use.

flavor.20: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user’s Attack stat.

tr01.name: TR01
tr01.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Body Slam. One use.

flavor.20: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr02.name: TR02
tr02.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Flamethrower. One use.

flavor.20: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr03.name: TR03
tr03.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Hydro Pump. One use.

flavor.20: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

tr04.name: TR04
tr04.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Surf. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

tr05.name: TR05
tr05.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Ice Beam. One use.

flavor.20: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

tr06.name: TR06
tr06.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Blizzard. One use.

flavor.20: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

tr07.name: TR07
tr07.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Low Kick. One use.

flavor.20: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr08.name: TR08
tr08.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Thunderbolt. One use.

flavor.20: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr09.name: TR09
tr09.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Thunder. One use.

flavor.20: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr10.name: TR10
tr10.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Earthquake. One use.

flavor.20: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

tr11.name: TR11
tr11.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Psychic. One use.

flavor.20: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr12.name: TR12
tr12.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Agility. One use.

flavor.20: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply raises the Speed stat.

tr13.name: TR13
tr13.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Focus Energy. One use.

flavor.20: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

tr14.name: TR14
tr14.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Metronome. One use.

flavor.20: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

tr15.name: TR15
tr15.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Fire Blast. One use.

flavor.20: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr16.name: TR16
tr16.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Waterfall. One use.

flavor.20: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

tr17.name: TR17
tr17.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Amnesia. One use.

flavor.20: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Def stat.

tr18.name: TR18
tr18.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Leech Life. One use.

flavor.20: The user drains the target’s blood. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

tr19.name: TR19
tr19.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Tri Attack. One use.

flavor.20: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

tr20.name: TR20
tr20.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Substitute. One use.

flavor.20: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its HP. The substitute serves as the user’s decoy.

tr21.name: TR21
tr21.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Reversal. One use.

flavor.20: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

tr22.name: TR22
tr22.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Sludge Bomb. One use.

flavor.20: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. This may also poison the target.

tr23.name: TR23
tr23.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Spikes. One use.

flavor.20: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team’s feet. The trap hurts Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr24.name: TR24
tr24.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Outrage. One use.

flavor.20: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

tr25.name: TR25
tr25.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Psyshock. One use.

flavor.20: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

tr26.name: TR26
tr26.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Endure. One use.

flavor.20: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

tr27.name: TR27
tr27.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Sleep Talk. One use.

flavor.20: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

tr28.name: TR28
tr28.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Megahorn. One use.

flavor.20: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

tr29.name: TR29
tr29.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Baton Pass. One use.

flavor.20: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

tr30.name: TR30
tr30.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Encore. One use.

flavor.20: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

tr31.name: TR31
tr31.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Iron Tail. One use.

flavor.20: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

tr32.name: TR32
tr32.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Crunch. One use.

flavor.20: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

tr33.name: TR33
tr33.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Shadow Ball. One use.

flavor.20: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr34.name: TR34
tr34.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Future Sight. One use.

flavor.20: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

tr35.name: TR35
tr35.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Uproar. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

tr36.name: TR36
tr36.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Heat Wave. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave those Pokémon with a burn.

tr37.name: TR37
tr37.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Taunt. One use.

flavor.20: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

tr38.name: TR38
tr38.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Trick. One use.

flavor.20: The user catches the target off guard and swaps its held item with its own.

tr39.name: TR39
tr39.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Superpower. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks the target with great power. However, this also lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats.

tr40.name: TR40
tr40.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Skill Swap. One use.

flavor.20: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

tr41.name: TR41
tr41.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Blaze Kick. One use.

flavor.20: The user launches a kick that lands a critical hit more easily. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr42.name: TR42
tr42.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Hyper Voice. One use.

flavor.20: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout with the power to inflict damage.

tr43.name: TR43
tr43.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Overheat. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

tr44.name: TR44
tr44.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Cosmic Power. One use.

flavor.20: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

tr45.name: TR45
tr45.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Muddy Water. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

tr46.name: TR46
tr46.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Iron Defense. One use.

flavor.20: The user hardens its body’s surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

tr47.name: TR47
tr47.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dragon Claw. One use.

flavor.20: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

tr48.name: TR48
tr48.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Bulk Up. One use.

flavor.20: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

tr49.name: TR49
tr49.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Calm Mind. One use.

flavor.20: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

tr50.name: TR50
tr50.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Leaf Blade. One use.

flavor.20: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

tr51.name: TR51
tr51.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dragon Dance. One use.

flavor.20: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

tr52.name: TR52
tr52.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Gyro Ball. One use.

flavor.20: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user compared to the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr53.name: TR53
tr53.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Close Combat. One use.

flavor.20: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

tr54.name: TR54
tr54.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Toxic Spikes. One use.

flavor.20: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr55.name: TR55
tr55.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Flare Blitz. One use.

flavor.20: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with a burn.

tr56.name: TR56
tr56.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Aura Sphere. One use.

flavor.20: The user lets loose a blast of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

tr57.name: TR57
tr57.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Poison Jab. One use.

flavor.20: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

tr58.name: TR58
tr58.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dark Pulse. One use.

flavor.20: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

tr59.name: TR59
tr59.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Seed Bomb. One use.

flavor.20: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

tr60.name: TR60
tr60.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move X-Scissor. One use.

flavor.20: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

tr61.name: TR61
tr61.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Bug Buzz. One use.

flavor.20: The user generates a damaging sound wave by vibration. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr62.name: TR62
tr62.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dragon Pulse. One use.

flavor.20: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

tr63.name: TR63
tr63.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Power Gem. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

tr64.name: TR64
tr64.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Focus Blast. One use.

flavor.20: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr65.name: TR65
tr65.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Energy Ball. One use.

flavor.20: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr66.name: TR66
tr66.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Brave Bird. One use.

flavor.20: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

tr67.name: TR67
tr67.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Earth Power. One use.

flavor.20: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr68.name: TR68
tr68.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Nasty Plot. One use.

flavor.20: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

tr69.name: TR69
tr69.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Zen Headbutt. One use.

flavor.20: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

tr70.name: TR70
tr70.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Flash Cannon. One use.

flavor.20: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

tr71.name: TR71
tr71.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Leaf Storm. One use.

flavor.20: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

tr72.name: TR72
tr72.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Power Whip. One use.

flavor.20: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target.

tr73.name: TR73
tr73.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Gunk Shot. One use.

flavor.20: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

tr74.name: TR74
tr74.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Iron Head. One use.

flavor.20: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

tr75.name: TR75
tr75.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stone Edge. One use.

flavor.20: The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.

tr76.name: TR76
tr76.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stealth Rock. One use.

flavor.20: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr77.name: TR77
tr77.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Grass Knot. One use.

flavor.20: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr78.name: TR78
tr78.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Sludge Wave. One use.

flavor.20: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.

tr79.name: TR79
tr79.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Heavy Slam. One use.

flavor.20: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr80.name: TR80
tr80.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Electro Ball. One use.

flavor.20: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr81.name: TR81
tr81.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Foul Play. One use.

flavor.20: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage it deals.

tr82.name: TR82
tr82.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Stored Power. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the move’s power.

tr83.name: TR83
tr83.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Ally Switch. One use.

flavor.20: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.

tr84.name: TR84
tr84.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Scald. One use.

flavor.20: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr85.name: TR85
tr85.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Work Up. One use.

flavor.20: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

tr86.name: TR86
tr86.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Wild Charge. One use.

flavor.20: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

tr87.name: TR87
tr87.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Drill Run. One use.

flavor.20: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

tr88.name: TR88
tr88.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Heat Crash. One use.

flavor.20: The user slams its target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

tr89.name: TR89
tr89.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Hurricane. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may also confuse the target.

tr90.name: TR90
tr90.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Play Rough. One use.

flavor.20: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

tr91.name: TR91
tr91.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Venom Drench. One use.

flavor.20: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

tr92.name: TR92
tr92.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Dazzling Gleam. One use.

flavor.20: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

tr93.name: TR93
tr93.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Darkest Lariat. One use.

flavor.20: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

tr94.name: TR94
tr94.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move High Horsepower. One use.

flavor.20: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

tr95.name: TR95
tr95.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Throat Chop. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

tr96.name: TR96
tr96.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Pollen Puff. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

tr97.name: TR97
tr97.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Psychic Fangs. One use.

flavor.20: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

tr98.name: TR98
tr98.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Liquidation. One use.

flavor.20: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

tr99.name: TR99
tr99.description: Teaches certain Pokemon the move Body Press. One use.

flavor.20: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.
The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

cracked pot.name: Cracked Pot
cracked pot.description: Evolves Sinistea into Polteageist when used.

flavor.20: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

chipped pot.name: Chipped Pot
chipped pot.description: Evolves Sinistea-Antique into Polteageist-Antique when used.

flavor.20: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.
Strange earbuds that allow you to freely control the volume of various sounds.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The syrupy fruits give off a strong tropical feel.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give a curry some richness.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. There are over fifty spices contained within this ingredient’s hot flavor.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Add some whipped cream to a spicy curry to give it some sweetness.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Using packaged curry helps make sure there are no slipups when cooking.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The refined sweetness of this coconut milk makes it quite popular.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It has a junk-food sort of taste, but it goes well with curry.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. If you’re unsure about what to cook, you can’t go wrong with some burger.
One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. A mysterious spice. Even a tiny sprinkle is sure to make a curry gigantic.
Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for the chance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.
Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn’t shake much.
A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered to a boy. Strangely, it looks old to you.
It’s signed by all members of the Galar region’s most charismatic band, the Maximizers.
Professor Sonia’s published writings. Her new discoveries about the Galar region’s legends are recorded in this enjoyable read.
A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalog to have Rotom hop in and out of the various devices listed within.

Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding this honey to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It also has the same effect as a Max Revive.
Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamax forms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.
A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It’s a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

galarica cuff.name: Galarica Cuff
galarica cuff.description: Evolves Galarian Slowpoke into Galarian Slowbro when used.

flavor.20: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.
A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons.
A pass to go to the Isle of Armor. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.
A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémon can get. A machine-like object is inside the charm.
Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector on the Isle of Armor.
A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.
Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light. The people of old times presented these to the King of Bountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

galarica wreath.name: Galarica Wreath
galarica wreath.description: Evolves Galarian Slowpoke into Galarian Slowking when used.

flavor.20: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.
A clue about the King of Bountiful Harvests. It’s written by Peony, and an old photo is attached to it.
A clue about the legend of giants. It’s written by Peony and has unique drawings.
A clue about the legend of bird Pokémon. It’s written by Peony and has a unique drawing.
A mysterious clue that Peony seems to have dropped. There’s a photo attached to it showing a shining hole opening above the Max Lair.
A pass to go to the Crown Tundra. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.
A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems to be chipped. Maybe it’s meant to be part of something.
A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvests gave you. It radiates faint light.
Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Glastrier. The hair is strong and very flexible.
Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is very smooth to the touch.
Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow.
Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a gloomy field.
Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector in the Crown Tundra.
Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you’ll get is determined by which field you plant the seeds in.
A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability.

adamant crystal.name: Adamant Crystal
adamant crystal.description: If held by a Dialga, its Steel- and Dragon-type attacks have 1.2x power.

lustrous globe.name: Lustrous Globe
lustrous globe.description: If held by a Palkia, its Water- and Dragon-type attacks have 1.2x power.

griseous core.name: Griseous Core
griseous core.description: If held by a Giratina, its Ghost- and Dragon-type attacks have 1.2x power.

blank plate.name: Blank Plate
blank plate.description: A stone tablet imbued with the essence of normalcy. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Normal type.

strange ball.name: Strange Ball
strange ball.description: Placeholder if caught in Poke Ball not in current game.

legend plate.name: Legend Plate
legend plate.description: A stone tablet imbued with the essence of all creation. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of every type there is.

rotom phone.name: Rotom Phone
rotom phone.description: The latest model of smartphone. A Pokémon called Rotom lives within it, and it can be used to run all sorts of handy apps.

sandwich.name: Sandwich
sandwich.description: A dish made by sandwiching vegetables, meat, or other ingredients between two pieces of bread. It makes a fantastic meal when out on a picnic.

koraidon’s poké ball.name: Koraidon’s Poké Ball
koraidon’s poké ball.description: A Poké Ball that can hold the mysterious Pokémon known as Koraidon. A boy named Arven gave it to you.

miraidon’s poké ball.name: Miraidon’s Poké Ball
miraidon’s poké ball.description: A Poké Ball that can hold the mysterious Pokémon known as Miraidon. A boy named Arven gave it to you.

tera orb.name: Tera Orb
tera orb.description: An orb that holds within it the power to crystallize. When it is charged with energy, it can be used to cause Pokémon to Terastallize.

scarlet book.name: Scarlet Book
scarlet book.description: A record of the expedition that the author, Heath, went on within the Great Crater of Paldea. The book has the name “Sada” written on it in clumsy handwriting.

violet book.name: Violet Book
violet book.description: A record of the expedition that the author, Heath, went on within the Great Crater of Paldea. The book has the name “Turo” written on it in clumsy handwriting.

kofu’s wallet.name: Kofu’s Wallet
kofu’s wallet.description: A wallet that was left behind by Kofu, the Gym Leader at the Cascarrafa Gym. You’re to deliver it to him at the market in Porto Marinada.

tiny bamboo shoot.name: Tiny Bamboo Shoot
tiny bamboo shoot.description: A small and rare bamboo shoot. It’s quite popular with a certain class of gourmands.

big bamboo shoot.name: Big Bamboo Shoot
big bamboo shoot.description: A large and rare bamboo shoot. It’s extremely popular with a certain class of gourmands.

scroll of darkness.name: Scroll of Darkness
scroll of darkness.description: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of darkness.

scroll of waters.name: Scroll of Waters
scroll of waters.description: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of water.

malicious armor.name: Malicious Armor
malicious armor.description: Evolves Charcadet into Ceruledge when used.

normal tera shard.name: Normal Tera Shard
normal tera shard.description: Normal Tera Shard allows a Pokémon's Tera Type to be changed to Normal in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet. It can be changed by speaking to the cook in the Treasure Eatery, Medali, and requires 50 Normal Tera Shards.

fire tera shard.name: Fire Tera Shard
fire tera shard.description: Fire Tera Shard allows a Pokémon's Tera Type to be changed to Fire in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet. It can be changed by speaking to the cook in the Treasure Eatery, Medali, and requires 50 Fire Tera Shards.

fairy tera shard.name: Fairy Tera Shard
fairy tera shard.description: Fairy Tera Shard allows a Pokémon's Tera Type to be changed to Fairy in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet. It can be changed by speaking to the cook in the Treasure Eatery, Medali, and requires 50 Fairy Tera Shards.

booster energy.name: Booster Energy
booster energy.description: Activates the Protosynthesis or Quark Drive Abilities. Single use.

ability shield.name: Ability Shield
ability shield.description: Holder's Ability cannot be changed, suppressed, or ignored by any effect.

clear amulet.name: Clear Amulet
clear amulet.description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering the holder's stat stages.

mirror herb.name: Mirror Herb
mirror herb.description: When an opposing Pokemon raises a stat stage, the holder copies it. Single use.

punching glove.name: Punching Glove
punching glove.description: Holder's punch-based attacks have 1.1x power and do not make contact.

covert cloak.name: Covert Cloak
covert cloak.description: Holder is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack.

loaded dice.name: Loaded Dice
loaded dice.description: Holder's moves that hit 2-5 times hit 4-5 times; Population Bomb hits 4-10 times.

baguette.name: Baguette
baguette.description: A long loaf sliced into top and bottom halves. Its aroma of wheat and its straightforward, salty flavor make it pair well with all kinds of sandwich ingredients.

mayonnaise.name: Mayonnaise
mayonnaise.description: A condiment that packs a very tart punch yet pairs well with various ingredients.

ketchup.name: Ketchup
ketchup.description: A condiment with very salty and tart flavor. While a number of other ingredients go into its signature flavor, the noble tomato is its heart and soul.

mustard.name: Mustard
mustard.description: A very spicy condiment that’s indispensable when bread is on the table. It pairs tremendously with ketchup.

butter.name: Butter
butter.description: A condiment that unites salty and sweet and also packs a richness that makes bread a delight to eat. The finest butter products are made of 100 percent Moomoo Milk.

peanut butter.name: Peanut Butter
peanut butter.description: A very sweet condiment. People in Paldea seem to favor the sweet varieties over the unsweetened.

chili sauce.name: Chili Sauce
chili sauce.description: A condiment with a very spicy kick. It’s thanks to Scovillain that this sauce gets its signature mouth-tingling burn.

salt.name: Salt
salt.description: A very salty seasoning, unsurprisingly. People quite like the grains of salt that can be gathered from the footprints of particularly jagged Naclstack.

pepper.name: Pepper
pepper.description: A seasoning packing very spicy flavor. It goes nicely with oilier foods and works especially well when you add just a pinch for a hint of flavor.

yogurt.name: Yogurt
yogurt.description: A condiment that’s very sweet and very sour. It goes especially well with fruit and is easy to incorporate into a sandwich.

whipped cream.name: Whipped Cream
whipped cream.description: A very sweet condiment. Folks in Paldea seem to love the varieties that really let the sweetness sing.

cream cheese.name: Cream Cheese
cream cheese.description: A condiment offering very sweet and very tart flavor. It goes well with more ingredients than you’d expect, making it a convenient go-to.

jam.name: Jam
jam.description: A condiment that’s very sweet and likewise very sour. Take care when adding it to sandwiches, as the sweet side can overwhelm.

marmalade.name: Marmalade
marmalade.description: A condiment with sour and bitter notes. It’s surprisingly useful, as it makes a nice counterpoint to oilier foods.

olive oil.name: Olive Oil
olive oil.description: A condiment offering faint notes of sour and bitter flavors. The most prized varieties are the ones Smoliv love the smell of—such oils’ quality is assured.

vinegar.name: Vinegar
vinegar.description: A very sour condiment. Vinegars derived from grapes are popular in Paldea. Highly effective when used to add just a light note of flavor.

sweet herba mystica.name: Sweet Herba Mystica
sweet herba mystica.description: A legendary condiment told of only in books. Word has it that one taste of its sweet flavor stimulates the digestive system and cures a lack of appetite.

salty herba mystica.name: Salty Herba Mystica
salty herba mystica.description: One of the condiments spoken of as legends. Its mellow saltiness is said to be tremendously effective when it comes to promoting health.

sour herba mystica.name: Sour Herba Mystica
sour herba mystica.description: This surpassingly sour condiment is said to be super effective in helping the eater recover from exhaustion. Only a scant few people know it exists.

bitter herba mystica.name: Bitter Herba Mystica
bitter herba mystica.description: A legendary condiment with a deeply bitter taste. It’s said to dramatically bolster a body’s immune defenses, though that hasn’t been proven.

spicy herba mystica.name: Spicy Herba Mystica
spicy herba mystica.description: The legendary condiment said to have the mightiest of all spicy flavors. It’s said that a single bite will kick the metabolism into high gear immediately.

lettuce.name: Lettuce
lettuce.description: This bitter-tasting ingredient is simple and straightforward—just add it to all kinds of other ingredients for a delightfully crunchy time.

tomato.name: Tomato
tomato.description: This very tart ingredient has a lot of savory elements to it, making it popular with many Pokémon.

cherry tomatoes.name: Cherry Tomatoes
cherry tomatoes.description: A very tart ingredient. Some varieties are also very sweet, and these are prized above all others by the people of Paldea.

cucumber.name: Cucumber
cucumber.description: A tart and bitter ingredient. Using it together with rich-tasting ingredients in a sandwich will really make the most of a cucumber’s fresh-veggie aroma.

pickle.name: Pickle
pickle.description: This very sour ingredient is made by pickling veggies in a flavorful brine made from spices and vinegar.

onion.name: Onion
onion.description: This spicy veggie is indispensable to many sandwiches. It goes well with rich ingredients.

red onion.name: Red Onion
red onion.description: An ingredient with some sweetness to it. Its spiciness and fragrance are milder than those of other onions, making it a pleasant bite.

green bell pepper.name: Green Bell Pepper
green bell pepper.description: An ingredient with some bitterness. When sliced, it adds a nice accent to a sandwich.

red bell pepper.name: Red Bell Pepper
red bell pepper.description: An ingredient with some bitterness—but its bitter notes and overall flavor are pleasantly mild compared to its green cousin.

yellow bell pepper.name: Yellow Bell Pepper
yellow bell pepper.description: An ingredient with some bitterness. It’s not much different from its red counterpart in flavor, but mixing the colors makes a feast for the eyes.

avocado.name: Avocado
avocado.description: An ingredient with sweet notes—though its flavor is very mild. The avocado’s richness, however, makes it satisfying to eat.

bacon.name: Bacon
bacon.description: This very salty ingredient has been cooked just shy of charred, making it burst with fragrance and tasty flavor.

ham.name: Ham
ham.description: A very salty ingredient—and that very saltiness is what makes it such a nice companion to veggies.

prosciutto.name: Prosciutto
prosciutto.description: This ingredient is very salty like regular ham, but the difference is prosciutto is not cooked after it is cured, giving it a fun freshness.

chorizo.name: Chorizo
chorizo.description: A very salty and spicy ingredient. This type of sausage has particularly robust salty flavor, and the spicier varieties are extra popular.

herbed sausage.name: Herbed Sausage
herbed sausage.description: A very salty and bitter ingredient. The balance between the potent saltiness and the herbs’ bitterness make this sausage a pleasure.

hamburger.name: Hamburger
hamburger.description: This very salty ingredient is the thing to add if you want to make your sandwich truly filling.

klawf stick.name: Klawf Stick
klawf stick.description: A very sweet and salty ingredient. It’s a nutritious processed food made with a concentrate derived from shed Klawf shells.

smoked fillet.name: Smoked Fillet
smoked fillet.description: A very salty and bitter ingredient with that unmistakable smoky flavor. It pairs exceptionally well with veggies.

fried fillet.name: Fried Fillet
fried fillet.description: When used in a sandwich, this very salty and bitter ingredient is at its best paired with sour seasonings.

egg.name: Egg
egg.description: An ingredient with a touch of saltiness. It’s full of nutrients and can be enjoyed with all sorts of seasonings.

potato tortilla.name: Potato Tortilla
potato tortilla.description: A very salty ingredient and a popular dish in Paldea. It’s undeniably filling.

tofu.name: Tofu
tofu.description: An ingredient with a touch of sweetness. It’s unclear how well this raw block of tofu will serve as a sandwich filling.

rice.name: Rice
rice.description: An ingredient with a touch of sweetness. It’s unclear how well this cooked rice will serve as a sandwich filling.

noodles.name: Noodles
noodles.description: A nice salty ingredient. It’s unclear how well these boiled noodles will serve as a sandwich filling.

potato salad.name: Potato Salad
potato salad.description: This very tart ingredient—a soft salad that’s all about potatoes—pairs tremendously well with bread.

cheese.name: Cheese
cheese.description: A very salty ingredient. This thinly sliced cheese is perfect for adding to a sandwich.

banana.name: Banana
banana.description: A very sweet ingredient. This go-to fruit is sweet and rich, and it’s beloved by many Pokémon.

strawberry.name: Strawberry
strawberry.description: A very tart and sweet ingredient, popular for its ability to make a sandwich visually striking.

apple.name: Apple
apple.description: This very sweet ingredient is sliced thin to make it easy to add into a sandwich.

kiwi.name: Kiwi
kiwi.description: A very tart ingredient that has a light touch of sweetness as well. It goes well with rich ingredients.

pineapple.name: Pineapple
pineapple.description: This very tart ingredient is a fruit of southern lands, and its color and texture are a thrill. It’s been cut into chunks to be easily manageable.

jalapeño.name: Jalapeño
jalapeño.description: A very spicy ingredient—so spicy as to leave no room for ambivalence about it. You either like it or you don’t.

horseradish.name: Horseradish
horseradish.description: A very spicy condiment. Its distinctive sharp sizzle in your sinuses makes it a good match for rich fillings.

curry powder.name: Curry Powder
curry powder.description: A very spicy condiment. Just watch out—use too much of this potent seasoning, and it’ll cancel out the other flavors.

wasabi.name: Wasabi
wasabi.description: This very spicy condiment seems close to horseradish at first, but you’ll find that it has a superb flavor all its own.

watercress.name: Watercress
watercress.description: A very bitter ingredient that stands out among veggies for its quirky flavor. People tend to either like it or not like it—they rarely sit on the fence.

basil.name: Basil
basil.description: A very bitter ingredient that’s quite versatile, as herbs go. It’s fragrant and goes well with tomatoes.

venonat fang.name: Venonat Fang
venonat fang.description: Venonat Fang is a Pokémon material dropped by the Venonat family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

diglett dirt.name: Diglett Dirt
diglett dirt.description: Diglett Dirt is a Pokémon material dropped by the Diglett family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

meowth fur.name: Meowth Fur
meowth fur.description: Meowth Fur is a Pokémon material dropped by the Meowth family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

psyduck down.description: Psyduck Down is a Pokémon material dropped by the Psyduck family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

gimmighoul coin.name: Gimmighoul Coin
gimmighoul coin.description: Gimmighoul Coin is a Pokémon material dropped by Gimmighoul when they are captured or defeated in battle. Collecting 999 Coins allows Gimmighoul to evolve into Gholdengo. The bag limit is 999 Coins, however any extra are found by a man in Medali. Once Gimmighoul has been evolved those extra coins can be retrieved from the man.

tinkatink hair.name: Tinkatink Hair
tinkatink hair.description: Tinkatink Hair is a Pokémon material dropped by the Tinkatink family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

charcadet soot.description: Charcadet Soot is a Pokémon material dropped by the Charcadet family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

toedscool flaps.description: Toedscool Flaps is a Pokémon material dropped by the Toedscool family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

wooper slime.description: Wooper Slime is a Pokémon material dropped by the Wooper family when they are captured or defeated in battle. It is used to craft TMs in Pokémon Scarlet/Violet using the TM Machine.

picnic set.name: Picnic Set
picnic set.description: A roomy basket packed with all sorts of things for use when enjoying picnicking with your Pokémon.

academy bottle.name: Academy Bottle
academy bottle.description: A bottle emblazoned with the academy’s emblem. It’s light, sturdy, and vacuum insulated, so it’ll keep your hots hot and your colds cold.

polka-dot bottle.name: Polka-Dot Bottle
polka-dot bottle.description: A polka-dot-patterned bottle that’s small, light, and even comes with a cup. The detachable strap makes it handy for walking around with.

striped bottle.name: Striped Bottle
striped bottle.description: A striped bottle that’s small, light, and even comes with a cup. The detachable strap makes it handy for walking around with.

diamond bottle.name: Diamond Bottle
diamond bottle.description: A diamond-patterned bottle that’s small, light, and even comes with a cup. The detachable strap makes it handy for walking around with.

academy cup.name: Academy Cup
academy cup.description: The academy’s standard-issue cup for picnicking. The careful design of its mouth makes it popular both inside and outside the academy.

striped cup.name: Striped Cup
striped cup.description: A cup for kids to use at picnics. It’s made of light but strong material. It’s stackable, which makes it handy for carrying around.

polka-dot cup.name: Polka-Dot Cup
polka-dot cup.description: A cup for kids to use at picnics. It’s made of light but strong material. It’s stackable, which makes it handy for carrying around.

flower pattern cup.name: Flower Pattern Cup
flower pattern cup.description: A cup for kids to use at picnics. It’s made of light but strong material. It’s stackable, which makes it handy for carrying around.

academy tablecloth.name: Academy Tablecloth
academy tablecloth.description: The academy’s standard-issue tablecloth. It’s made with the latest fiber-processing technology and is so tough that not even a Razor Claw can tear it.

whimsical tablecloth.name: Whimsical Tablecloth
whimsical tablecloth.description: A tablecloth made in collaboration with a popular picture-book author. The gently drawn Pokémon make even the loveliest picnic table more charming.

leafy tablecloth.name: Leafy Tablecloth
leafy tablecloth.description: A botanically themed tablecloth featuring Grass-type Pokémon. Can you find the Pokémon that doesn’t quite fit in?

spooky tablecloth.name: Spooky Tablecloth
spooky tablecloth.description: A pop-art-style tablecloth with Pokémon faces floating up from the deep nighttime blue. This is a must-have for fans of Ghost types.

academy ball.name: Academy Ball
academy ball.description: The academy’s standard-issue ball in a regulation size. Lots of students believe that if you kick it right on the academy emblem, it’ll fly in a straight line.

marill ball.name: Marill Ball
marill ball.description: A Marill-themed ball. It’s soft and springy. Make sure you haven’t mistaken a real Marill for this ball before throwing.

yarn ball.name: Yarn Ball
yarn ball.description: A small ball of yarn. It’s woven tight so as not to unravel, but even if it were to come undone, at least you could still use the yarn for something.

cyber ball.name: Cyber Ball
cyber ball.description: A ball themed after hardcore gaming PCs. It may not light up like its inspiration, but it still stands out.

gold pick.name: Gold Pick
gold pick.description: A golden pick that oozes class. Using it on a sandwich lends an extravagant air that’ll make you want to eat up, even if you don’t love the fillings.

silver pick.name: Silver Pick
silver pick.description: A silver pick that oozes class. Using it on a sandwich lends an extravagant air that’ll make you want to eat up, even if you don’t love the fillings.

red-flag pick.name: Red-Flag Pick
red-flag pick.description: This pick flies a red flag that lends an air of adventure. The flag itself is made of card stock, so it’ll fly proudly even with no wind.

blue-flag pick.name: Blue-Flag Pick
blue-flag pick.description: This pick flies a blue flag that lends an air of adventure. The flag itself is made of card stock, so it’ll fly proudly even with no wind.

pika-pika pick.name: Pika-Pika Pick
pika-pika pick.description: A Pick-achu, as it were, sporting Pikachu’s usual expression. It’s easy to grab by the ears, which is part of why it’s so popular.

winking pika pick.name: Winking Pika Pick
winking pika pick.description: A Pick-achu, if you will, sporting Pikachu’s winking face. It’s easy to grab by the ears, which is part of why it’s so popular.

vee-vee pick.name: Vee-Vee Pick
vee-vee pick.description: A pick designed after Eevee, sporting the Pokémon’s usual expression. It’s easy to grab by the ears, which is part of why it’s so popular.

smiling vee pick.name: Smiling Vee Pick
smiling vee pick.description: A pick designed after Eevee, sporting the Pokémon’s smiling face. It’s easy to grab by the ears, which is part of why it’s so popular.

blue poké ball pick.name: Blue Poké Ball Pick
blue poké ball pick.description: A sandwich pick with a simple blue Poké Ball design. Often used by Trainers who picked a Water-type Pokémon for their first partner.

auspicious armor.name: Auspicious Armor
auspicious armor.description: Evolves Charcadet into Armarouge when used.

leader’s crest.name: Leader’s Crest
leader’s crest.description: A shard of what appears to be an old blade of some sort. It is held only by Bisharp that head up a group of Pawniard.

pink bottle.name: Pink Bottle
pink bottle.description: A go-to bottle widely used for drinks at picnics. Its simple design and portability make it popular among all sorts of people.

blue bottle.name: Blue Bottle
blue bottle.description: A go-to bottle widely used for drinks at picnics. Its simple design and portability make it popular among all sorts of people.

yellow bottle.name: Yellow Bottle
yellow bottle.description: A go-to bottle widely used for drinks at picnics. Its simple design and portability make it popular among all sorts of people.

steel bottle (r).name: Steel Bottle (R)
steel bottle (r).description: A go-to bottle sometimes used while camping. The stainless steel keeps the temperature inside steady, making it great for keeping drinks hot or cold.

steel bottle (y).name: Steel Bottle (Y)
steel bottle (y).description: A go-to bottle sometimes used while camping. The stainless steel keeps the temperature inside steady, making it great for keeping drinks hot or cold.

steel bottle (b).name: Steel Bottle (B)
steel bottle (b).description: A go-to bottle sometimes used while camping. The stainless steel keeps the temperature inside steady, making it great for keeping drinks hot or cold.

silver bottle.name: Silver Bottle
silver bottle.description: A popular option among hikers. It’s made with titanium, so it doesn’t rust even if it’s used to hold drinks with high sodium content.

barred cup.name: Barred Cup
barred cup.description: A cup that’s as good for using at home as on a picnic. It’s light, sturdy, and stacks well, so it’s a cinch to pack up and carry around.

diamond pattern cup.name: Diamond Pattern Cup
diamond pattern cup.description: A cup that’s as good for using at home as on a picnic. It’s light, sturdy, and stacks well, so it’s a cinch to pack up and carry around.

fire pattern cup.name: Fire Pattern Cup
fire pattern cup.description: A cup that’s as good for using at home as on a picnic. It’s light, sturdy, and stacks well, so it’s a cinch to pack up and carry around.

pink cup.name: Pink Cup
pink cup.description: A cup sold with the Pink Bottle. The two don’t stack, so they’re tough to pack—but they look good, so they’re popular with those who like to post picnic photos.

blue cup.name: Blue Cup
blue cup.description: A cup sold with the Blue Bottle. The two don’t stack, so they’re tough to pack—but they look good, so they’re popular with those who like to post picnic photos.

yellow cup.name: Yellow Cup
yellow cup.description: A cup sold with the Yellow Bottle. The two don’t stack, so they’re tough to pack—but they look good, so they’re popular with those who like to post picnic photos.

pikachu cup.name: Pikachu Cup
pikachu cup.description: A cup for big-time Pokémon fans. Kids will happily drink out of it, making it a boon to parents.

eevee cup.name: Eevee Cup
eevee cup.description: A cup for big-time Pokémon fans. Kids will happily drink out of it, making it a boon to parents.

slowpoke cup.name: Slowpoke Cup

silver cup.name: Silver Cup
silver cup.description: A popular option among hikers. It’s made with titanium, so it doesn’t rust even if it’s used to hold drinks with high sodium content.

exercise ball.name: Exercise Ball
exercise ball.description: A big ball designed for exercising. It can work as a seat if you get tired, too.

plaid tablecloth (y).name: Plaid Tablecloth (Y)
plaid tablecloth (y).description: A sturdy tablecloth made of thick fabric. The cheery yellow plaid brightens up a table.

plaid tablecloth (b).name: Plaid Tablecloth (B)
plaid tablecloth (b).description: A sturdy tablecloth made of thick fabric. The gentle blue plaid gives a table a crisp look.

plaid tablecloth (r).name: Plaid Tablecloth (R)
plaid tablecloth (r).description: A sturdy tablecloth made of thick fabric. The quietly composed red plaid gives the table some flair.

b&w grass tablecloth.name: B&W Grass Tablecloth
b&w grass tablecloth.description: A tablecloth with a fun, trendy black-and-white design featuring Pokémon that seem poised to leap from the tall grass at any moment.

battle tablecloth.name: Battle Tablecloth
battle tablecloth.description: A garish, eye-catching tablecloth. Putting this on your picnic table will inspire any person or Pokémon who eats there to do their best.

monstrous tablecloth.name: Monstrous Tablecloth
monstrous tablecloth.description: A tablecloth designed by the Pewter Museum of Science. The academic air of the pattern is a big hit with kids and adults alike.

striped tablecloth.name: Striped Tablecloth
striped tablecloth.description: A tablecloth with a fashionable striped pattern. It’s great at repelling water and mold, and stains and smudges wipe right off.

diamond tablecloth.name: Diamond Tablecloth
diamond tablecloth.description: A tablecloth with a fashionable diamond pattern. It’s great at repelling water and mold, and stains and smudges wipe right off.

polka-dot tablecloth.name: Polka-Dot Tablecloth
polka-dot tablecloth.description: A tablecloth with a fashionable polka-dot pattern. It’s great at repelling water and mold, and stains and smudges wipe right off.

lilac tablecloth.name: Lilac Tablecloth
lilac tablecloth.description: A light purple tablecloth. It’s smooth and pleasant to the touch, and dishes can be placed on it with hardly a sound.

mint tablecloth.name: Mint Tablecloth
mint tablecloth.description: A light mint-colored tablecloth. It’s smooth and pleasant to the touch, and dishes can be placed on it with hardly a sound.

peach tablecloth.name: Peach Tablecloth
peach tablecloth.description: A light peach-colored tablecloth. It’s smooth and pleasant to the touch, and dishes can be placed on it with hardly a sound.

yellow tablecloth.name: Yellow Tablecloth
yellow tablecloth.description: A simple yellow tablecloth. It’s smooth and pleasant to the touch, and dishes can be placed on it with hardly a sound.

green poké ball pick.name: Green Poké Ball Pick
green poké ball pick.description: A sandwich pick with a simple green Poké Ball design. Often used by Trainers who picked a Grass-type Pokémon for their first partner.

red poké ball pick.name: Red Poké Ball Pick
red poké ball pick.description: A sandwich pick with a simple red Poké Ball design. Often used by Trainers who picked a Fire-type Pokémon for their first partner.

party sparkler pick.name: Party Sparkler Pick
party sparkler pick.description: This pick features a small sparkler that goes off automatically. It’s used at parties or for guests of honor. It leaves an oddly appealing aroma once it’s burned out.

heroic sword pick.name: Heroic Sword Pick
heroic sword pick.description: A pick made to be the coolest. Once you’ve eaten, you can pretend you’re a hero of legend. Souvenir shops at tourist spots sell these for some reason.

magical star pick.name: Magical Star Pick
magical star pick.description: A pick shaped after a magic wand. Perhaps the real magic is the food maker’s wish for a delicious dish.

magical heart pick.name: Magical Heart Pick
magical heart pick.description: A pick shaped after a magic wand. Perhaps the real magic is the food maker’s wish for a delicious dish.

parasol pick.name: Parasol Pick
parasol pick.description: Some complain that the parasol part of this pick is hard to hold on to, so your fingers get messy. Still, it’s fun to twirl this all around after you’ve eaten.

blue-sky flower pick.name: Blue-Sky Flower Pick
blue-sky flower pick.description: A flower pick designed to evoke a blue sky. It’s part of a line of “sky-flower” picks. Using a few is guaranteed to boost that special picnic spirit.

sunset flower pick.name: Sunset Flower Pick
sunset flower pick.description: A flower pick designed to evoke a blazing sunset. It’s part of a line of “sky-flower” picks. Using a few is guaranteed to boost that special picnic spirit.

sunrise flower pick.name: Sunrise Flower Pick
sunrise flower pick.description: A flower pick designed to evoke a glorious sunrise. It’s part of a line of “sky-flower” picks. Using a few is guaranteed to boost that special picnic spirit.

blue dish.name: Blue Dish
blue dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The blue variety is a consistent strong seller.

green dish.name: Green Dish
green dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The green variety is quite popular.

orange dish.name: Orange Dish
orange dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The orange variety is the most popular of all.

red dish.name: Red Dish
red dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The red variety never fails to sell well.

white dish.name: White Dish
white dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The white variety comes recommended by sellers.

yellow dish.name: Yellow Dish
yellow dish.description: A dish for picnics. Comes in plenty of colors to choose from based on the food or the mood. The yellow variety is impossible to go wrong with.

roto stick.name: Roto Stick
roto stick.description: A stick to rest a Rotom Phone on. It allows you to take selfies from a little bit farther away than you could on your own.

teal style card.name: Teal Style Card
teal style card.description: Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

teal mask.name: Teal Mask
teal mask.description: A teal mask patterned after the face of an ogre. Ogerpon dropped it while fleeing up the stairs after visiting the Festival of Masks.

glimmering charm.name: Glimmering Charm
glimmering charm.description: Having one of these mysterious glimmering charms increases the number of Tera Shards you receive from Tera Raid Battles.

crystal cluster.name: Crystal Cluster
crystal cluster.description: A cluster of the crystals found within the Crystal Pool. They sparkle brilliantly and are apparently necessary to repair a certain mask.

wellspring mask.name: Wellspring Mask
wellspring mask.description: Ogerpon-Wellspring: 1.2x power attacks; Terastallize to gain Embody Aspect.

hearthflame mask.name: Hearthflame Mask
hearthflame mask.description: Ogerpon-Hearthflame: 1.2x power attacks; Terastallize to gain Embody Aspect.

cornerstone mask.name: Cornerstone Mask
cornerstone mask.description: Ogerpon-Cornerstone: 1.2x power attacks; Terastallize to gain Embody Aspect.

masterpiece teacup.name: Masterpiece Teacup
masterpiece teacup.description: Evolves Poltchageist-Artisan into Sinistcha-Masterpiece when used.
